allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:d[k] for k in list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:10]}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: d = json.loads\(line\) msg = d.get\('message', {}\) usage = msg.get\('usage'\) if usage: print\(json.dumps\({ 'type': d.get\('type'\), 'role': msg.get\('role', '?'\), 'input_tokens': usage.get\('input_tokens', 0\), 'cache_creation': usage.get\('cache_creation_input_tokens', 0\), 'cache_read': usage.get\('cache_read_input_tokens', 0\), 'output_tokens': usage.get\('output_tokens', 0\), }\)\) ")
